name: TRIGGR (Indian audio brand, founded 2023)
description: The most standout feature of the Wukong is its case shaped like a warrior's helmet — glossy black with gold accents, glowing orange eyes, and geometric faceted surfaces. The earbuds themselves have a gold knurled stem with the TRIGGR branding engraved on them. It's inspired by the legendary Monkey King (Sun Wukong) character — hence the name.

name: TRIGGR True Wireless Earbuds
description: TRIGGR True Wireless Earbuds are compact Bluetooth earbuds designed for everyday music listening, calls, and portable use. The earbuds come with a lightweight charging case featuring a bold black exterior and red interior. The ergonomic in-ear design ensures a secure fit while delivering clear audio for calls and music playback. Key Features True Wireless Stereo earbuds In-ear ergonomic design Bluetooth wireless connectivity Portable charging case Compact lightweight design LED charging indicator Built for music, calls, and daily use Typical Specifications Feature Details Product Type True Wireless Earbuds Connectivity Bluetooth Fit Type In-ear Charging Case Yes Microphone Built-in Controls Touch / button control (varies by model) Use Case Music, calls, daily portable audio

name: TRIGGR Kraken X1 True Wireless Earbuds
description: The Pious Feature Phone packs a powerful Dumdaar 3000mAh battery into a classic keypad design. Built for durability and long-lasting daily use, this phone is ideal as a backup device or for those who prefer simplicity. Reliable call quality and a sturdy build make it an unbeatable value at just ₹149.

name: TRIGGR Ultrabuds N4 True Wireless Earbuds
description: True wireless earbuds with 40 hours total playback, 13mm large audio drivers with BassXpand technology, Bluetooth 5.4 connectivity, 50ms low latency gaming mode and TruComm MEMS mic with AI ENC for clear voice calls.

name: Number Navo Buds X1 True Wireless Earbuds
description: True wireless earbuds featuring Bluetooth 5.4 connectivity, 13mm dynamic drivers with deep bass, up to 50 hours total playback with charging case, dual pairing support, AI-ENC microphones for clear calls and 45ms ultra-low latency gaming mode.

name: boAt Airdopes 141 True Wireless Earbuds
description: True wireless earbuds with boAt IWP technology for instant pairing, ENx environmental noise cancellation for clear voice calls, low-latency gaming mode, and long battery backup designed for music, gaming and daily use.

name: boAt PartyPal 300 / 320 Bluetooth Party Speaker 120W
description: boAt PartyPal 300/320 high power Bluetooth party speaker designed for loud music playback with flame LED lights, microphone support and powerful bass for parties and events.

name: Dell Inspiron 3520 Intel Core i5 12th Gen Laptop (8GB RAM, 512GB SSD)
description: Dell Inspiron 3520 thin and light laptop powered by Intel Core i5 12th Gen processor with fast SSD storage, full HD display and Windows 11 designed for productivity and daily computing.

name: Dell 14 (2025) Intel Core i3 13th Gen Laptop (8GB RAM, 512GB SSD)
description: Dell 14 inch lightweight laptop powered by Intel Core i3 13th Gen processor with SSD storage, Windows 11 and MS Office support designed for everyday work and study tasks.

name: Zebronics Juke Bar 9900 DTS X Dolby Atmos 725W Soundbar
description: Zebronics Juke Bar 9900 premium home theatre soundbar system with DTS X, Dolby Atmos support, wireless subwoofer and satellite speakers delivering powerful 725W surround sound.

name: Kreo Halo 12 Inch Ring Light With Tripod
description: 12-inch LED ring light with adjustable tripod and phone holder designed for reels, live streaming and video recording. Provides multiple lighting modes with adjustable brightness for professional content creation.

name: ADZOY 6.9 ft Metal Tripod with 10 inch Ring Light & Collar Microphone
description: Complete content creation kit featuring a 10-inch LED ring light, adjustable 6.9-foot metal tripod stand and collar microphone. Designed for YouTube videos, reels, live streaming, online classes and photography with adjustable lighting modes and stable tripod support.

name: BOYA Omic-U Wireless Microphone (Type-C)
description: Compact wireless lavalier microphone system designed for Android phones and PCs with Type-C connection. Ideal for vloggers, content creators, interviews and mobile recording with clear digital audio and plug-and-play connectivity.

name: BOYA MIC 2 Wireless Microphone System
description: Professional wireless microphone system with 32-bit float recording, AI noise cancellation and long battery life designed for creators, vloggers and professional audio recording.

name: Rode NT1 5th Generation Studio Condenser Microphone
description: Professional large-diaphragm studio condenser microphone designed for high-quality recording, vocals, podcasting and music production with ultra-low noise and detailed sound capture.

name: OnePlus Nord Buds 3r TWS Earbuds (Ash Black)
description: True wireless earbuds designed for immersive sound and long listening sessions. OnePlus Nord Buds 3r feature powerful drivers, fast charging support and AI-enhanced dual-mic calling for clear conversations and deep bass audio.

name: Android Tablet Vivid Play - 8MP Front Camera Quad Speakers Dolby Atmos Quad-Core
description: The Vivid Play Android Tablet features an 8MP front camera for crisp video calls, quad speakers with Dolby Atmos for an immersive audio experience, and efficient quad-core performance for smooth entertainment and multitasking. Whether you are streaming, gaming, or working, this tablet handles it all with ease.

name: Google TV Interface - Personalized Content Recommendations Voice Assistant Smart Navigation
description: The integrated Google TV OS delivers a personalised entertainment experience with smart content recommendations tailored to your viewing habits. Built-in voice assistant control makes navigation effortless and intuitive. Access your favourite streaming apps, discover new content, and control your smart home — all from one interface.

name: GOVO Z40 Pro True Wireless Earbuds
description: High-performance true wireless earbuds with powerful bass drivers, quad-mic ENC technology and ultra-long 100-hour playback. Built with a rugged scratch-proof design and rubber grip finish for gaming, music and daily use.

name: Premium Smart Tablet - High-Resolution Display Stylus/Pen Support Creative Productivity
description: This Premium Smart Tablet combines a sleek modern design with a stunning high-resolution display for exceptional visual clarity. Stylus and pen support open up a world of creative and professional productivity — from note-taking and sketching to document annotation and design. A powerful tablet for creators and professionals.
